# openmetadata_glossary_term (Resource)

Manages an OpenMetadata Glossary Term.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openmetadata_glossary_term" "customer" {
  glossary    = openmetadata_glossary.business_glossary.name
  name        = "Customer"
  description = "An organization or individual that has purchased or is evaluating our product."
  synonyms    = ["Client", "Account"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Markdown description of the resource.
- `glossary` (String) Fully qualified name of the glossary this term belongs to.
- `name` (String) Unique name identifying the resource.

### Optional

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `domains` (List of String) Fully qualified names of the domains this resource belongs to.
- `mutually_exclusive` (Boolean) When true, child terms are mutually exclusive.
- `owners` (Attributes List) Owners of this resource. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--owners))
- `parent` (String) Fully qualified name of the parent glossary term (for nested terms).
- `related_terms` (List of String) Fully qualified names of related glossary terms.
- `synonyms` (List of String) Alternate names that are synonyms for this term.

### Read-Only

- `fully_qualified_name` (String) Fully qualified name of the resource.
- `id` (String) UUID of the resource assigned by OpenMetadata.

<a id="nestedatt--owners"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owners`

Required:

- `id` (String) UUID of the owner entity.
- `type` (String) Type of the owner entity (user or team).
